category_sources: source_facts.description: Command-line client for DAV; official GitHub README describes cadaver as a command-line WebDAV client.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cadaver; official homepage and repository use cadaver.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official cadaver homepage; official GitHub README provides project documentation.
repo_sources: Official cadaver GitHub README lists GitHub: https://github.com/notroj/cadaver; source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a DAV command-line client; official GitHub README describes WebDAV upload, download, editing, namespace, property, and locking operations.
